name: A Double-blind, Placebo-controlled Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of 24 Weeks Treatment With REN001 in Patients With Primary Mitochondrial Myopathy
short_name: STRIDE mavodelpar primary mitochondrial myopathy trial
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov registry record for the completed STRIDE phase 2 primary mitochondrial myopathy trial of mavodelpar, with results posted as of April 3, 2024 and the record version current to June 2, 2026.
